歡迎黎到G-Friend 討論區


Kim So Jung！Jung Ye Rin！Jung Eun Bi！
Choi Yu Na！Hwang Eun Bi！Kim Ye Won！

Yeo！ Ja ！Chin！ Gu！









GFRIEND（韓語：여자친구）是Source Music於2015年推出的韓國六人女子音樂組合，
成員包括Sowon、Yerin、Eunha、Yuju、SinB和Umji。

2014年10月30日，Source Music公開將於11月推出6人女團。同日，官網介紹4位成員: Sowon、Yerin、SinB、Umji。GFRIEND出道延遲至2015年。
2015年1月5日，Source Music通過官網公布GFRIEND出道日，並公開成員Eunha和Yuju。11日後的1月16日正式出道。粉絲名為Buddy(Buddies)。



你和我，畢地與女朋友

藝名意思：

Sowon：
여자친구의 모든 ‘소원’을 이루어라
實現女朋友的所有願望

Yerin：
슬기(睿)로운 이웃(隣)
藝名同本名一樣，睿智的近鄰

Eunha：
‘은하’수의 별처럼 빛나는 소녀
像銀河的星一樣發光的少女

Yuju：
파워풀한 가창력의 소‘유주’
Powerful唱功持有者

Sinb：
mysterious(신비로운) 매력을 가진 신비
擁有神秘魅力的Sinb

Umji：
엄지 척! 여자친구의 마스코트
Thumbs up! (豎起拇指) 女朋友的Mascot (吉祥物)

Umji of GFriend said she wants to have “chimaek” by the Hangang River with her bandmates in an interview with fashion magazine Dazed Korea.

During the interview, GFriend members were asked what they want to do as adults. In 2017, Umji and ShinB will reach legal age in Korea.

“I want to go to a ‘jjimjilbang (Korean spa)’ together. Now we can go to jjimjilbang at night without guaridans accompanying us,” ShinB said.

Sowon said, “I want to watch late night movies. Also, I want to get a driver’s license and go on a trip together in a car.”

GFriend is now working on a new album. “We cannot talk about the details yet, but we will be back again to meet your anticipation. Please wait for us,” they said.
